chat.message.media: Open on phone to view full media.
chat.send.placeholder.caption: Caption (optional)...
chat.message.not-supported: Message not supported, open WhatsApp App to see the message.
chat.promo.implementFeatures: You can implement Live Chat, Multiple Agents, and more features using
chat.promo.getChatsOverview: to get chats overview and messages
chat.promo.getRealTimeMessages: to get real-time messages on client side
apps.title: 🧩 Apps
apps.createSessionFirst: Create session first to add Apps
apps.noAppsFound: No apps found. Click "Add App" to create one.
apps.sessionStatusWarning: The session is in '{status}' status, in order to change apps or their configuration, the session will be restarted.
apps.chatwoot.section.connection.title: Connection
apps.chatwoot.inboxIdTooltip: Create and use different inboxes for every WhatsApp phone/session you're using
apps.chatwoot.section.messages.title: Messages
apps.chatwoot.languageTooltip: This is the integration language, not the Chatwoot account language. They can be different.
apps.chatwoot.linkPreview.label: Message Link Preview
apps.chatwoot.linkPreview.tooltip: For messages sent from ChatWoot to WhatsApp, control whether the message includes a generated link preview. 'None' sends only the link, 'LQ' uses a low-quality thumbnail, 'HQ' uses a higher-quality image preview.
apps.chatwoot.conversations.sort.label: Select Conversation Behavior
apps.chatwoot.conversations.sort.tooltip: Defines how WAHA selects which existing ChatWoot conversation to use for a contact when a new WhatsApp message arrives (by recent activity or creation time).
apps.chatwoot.conversations.statusFilter: Restricts which ChatWoot conversations WAHA may reuse for a contact. Only conversations with the selected statuses will be picked for new WhatsApp messages.
apps.chatwoot.conversations.markAsRead.l: Mark conversations as read on WhatsApp ack
apps.chatwoot.conversations.markAsRead.t: Process message.ack events to mark ChatWoot conversations as read. Enabled by default.
apps.chatwoot.section.commands.title: Commands
apps.chatwoot.useWebhookUrl: Use this Webhook URL for your ChatWoot Inbox:
apps.chatwoot.replaceBaseUrl: 👉 Replace WAHA_BASE_URL with Your WAHA URL
apps.chatwoot.exampleSetup: Example (if you're using docker-compose default setup):
apps.chatwoot.templates.title: Language Overrides
apps.chatwoot.templates.tooltip: You can override some templates to customize the messages sent to WhatsApp and ChatWoot.
apps.chatwoot.commands.tooltip: Choose which commands are available in WhatsApp Integration Chat. Disable any you don't want agents to execute.
apps.calls.name: Reject Calls
apps.calls.description: Reject incoming calls automatically and optionally send an auto-reply.
apps.calls.dm.title: 👤 Direct calls
apps.calls.group.title: 👥 Group calls
apps.calls.message.label: Auto-reply message
apps.calls.message.help: Send the message above on every call; clear it if you don't want to send any message.
apps.calls.message.default:
📞❌ We don't take calls right now.
🎤 Please send a voice message or 📝 text — we'll reply ASAP!
apps.calls.group.note: Sometimes WAHA can reject group calls without a matching group ID; in that case, it rejects the call but skips the message.
apps.calls.waitBeforeDecline.label: Wait before decline, seconds
apps.calls.waitBeforeDecline.help: Seconds to wait before declining the call. Leave empty to decline immediately.
apps.calls.waitBeforeResponse.label: Wait before auto-reply, seconds
apps.calls.waitBeforeResponse.help: Seconds to wait after declining before sending the auto-reply message. Leave empty to send immediately.
apps.mcp.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
apps.mcp.description: Expose WhatsApp as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for AI agents.
apps.mcp.connectHelp: Use the URL and API key below to connect your MCP client.
apps.mcp.connectDocsPrefix: Check how to connect different agents in
apps.mcp.keyHeader: Set as x-api-key header in your MCP client.
apps.mcp.keyHelp: This key is shown here — copy it now or find it in API Keys.
apps.mcp.actionsHelp: What MCP Agent can do with your WhatsApp account and session.
apiKeys.title: 🔑 Api Keys
apiKeys.idTooltip: This ID is not a secret key.
apiKeys.keyTooltip: Use this key in the X-Api-Key HTTP header.
apiKeys.actions_media_desc: Download files from WhatsApp session (all API keys have media access for direct links)
apiKeys.actions_read_desc: Read WhatsApp data: messages, contacts, chats, groups
apiKeys.actions_send_desc: Change WhatsApp data: send messages, manage groups, labels, contacts, profile
apiKeys.actions_control_desc: Lifecycle: start, stop, restart, logout, authenticate
servers.workersDataSaved: Workers data is saved in your browser's local storage.
servers.safeToStoreApiKey: It's safe to put server API and key here.

servers.mixedContentWarning: You're using https:// connection but server is using http:// connection.
servers.notPossibleDueTo: It's not possible to use it due to

servers.gracefulStop: By default it will gracefully stop the server, but you can force restart.

sessions.name: Name
sessions.assignedWorkerIdDoesNotMatch: Assigned Worker ID does not match
sessions.pleaseConnectToServerFirst: Please connect to a server first
sessions.changeServerOrNameInfo: To change the 'Server' or 'Name' - please remove the session and run again.
sessions.clientDeviceNameTooltip: Overrides default or globally set WAHA_CLIENT_DEVICE_NAME.
sessions.clientBrowserNameTooltip: Overrides default or globally set WAHA_CLIENT_BROWSER_NAME.
sessions.gowsClientConfigWarning.1: GOWS currently supports client config only via environment variables and does not apply per-session device/browser settings.
sessions.clientDeviceNamePlaceholder: Select or type a device name
sessions.clientBrowserNamePlaceholder: Select or type a browser name
sessions.webjs.tagsEventsOnTooltip:
Enable emission of special 'tag:*' engine events required for presence.update and message.ack.
WARNING: Enabling this may have performance and stability impact. Disabled by default.
sessions.gows.storage.messagesTooltip: Store messages locally. Set to off to disable; omit or null keeps it enabled.
sessions.gows.storage.chatsTooltip: Store chats locally. Set to off to disable; omit or null keeps it enabled.
sessions.gows.storage.groupsTooltip: Store groups locally. Set to off to disable; omit or null keeps it enabled.
sessions.gows.storage.labelsTooltip: Store labels locally. Set to off to disable; omit or null keeps it enabled.
sessions.presenceTooltip: Send presence when connect for the connected session. If presence online - you don not get notifications in your phone
sessions.storeTooltip: Store contacts, chats, messages in the database, so you can get it in API
sessions.storeFullSyncTooltip:
Sync all contacts, chats, messages from the phone at the start.
Otherwise the store can miss some information.
sessions.metadataTooltip: Key value pairs you can attach to Session and will receive it in webhooks, API and search the values on Dashboard.
sessions.config.ignore.title: 💬 Chats
sessions.config.ignore.status.title: 🟢 Status
sessions.config.ignore.groups.title: 👥 Groups
sessions.config.ignore.channels.title: 📢 Channels
sessions.config.ignore.broadcast.title: 📡 Broadcast
sessions.config.ignore.tooltip: Filters out all chat events and does not store messages in the database. You can still send messages to those chats via the API, but message acknowledgements (message.ack event) will not be available.
sessions.sessionRestartWarning: The session is in '{status}' status, in order to save configuration the session will be restarted.
sessions.hideDuplicatesTooltip:
Hide STOPPED sessions with the same "name" .
Useful when you use multiple workers with the same database
sessions.webhooks.title: 🔄 Webhooks
sessions.guide.qr.pointPhone: Point your phone to this screen to capture {qrCode}
sessions.guide.code.linkWithPhone: Link with {linkWithPhone} and enter the code
sessions.passkey.requires: This account requires a passkey to finish pairing.
sessions.passkey.submitted: Submitted! Waiting for the session to connect…
sessions.passkey.confirmHint: Check that the code below matches the one shown on your phone, then confirm.
sessions.passkey.confirmed: Confirmed! Waiting for the session to connect…
sessions.passkey.extensionDetected: Extension detected — click below and a web.whatsapp.com tab will open for you to confirm with your passkey (Touch ID / Windows Hello / phone).
sessions.passkey.extensionNotDetected: Extension not detected. Install it to connect with one click, or use the manual method below.
sessions.passkey.noInstallNeeded: No need to install anything — just do the step below in your browser.
sessions.passkey.manualStep1: Open https://web.whatsapp.com in a browser tab.
sessions.passkey.manualStep3: Click Copy script and paste it into the console (Enter).
sessions.passkey.manualStep4: Click the green button that appears on the page and confirm with your passkey (Touch ID / Windows Hello / phone).
sessions.passkey.manualStep5: Paste the result into the field below and click Send.
sessions.passkey.noChallenge: No passkey challenge yet — it loads once the session asks for a passkey. Please wait for it to load, then try again.
sessions.passkey.scriptResult: [WAHA] Passkey result (copy and paste back into WAHA):
sessions.passkey.scriptDone: ✅ Done — copied. Paste it back into WAHA.
sessions.passkey.bannerRecommend: We recommend installing WAHA Browser Extension to connect sessions that require Passkey automatically, with no copy-paste:
monitor.title: Event Monitor
monitor.description: Monitor WAHA Events from your sessions in real-time!
monitor.purpose: You can use Event Monitor for development and debugging purposes.
monitor.realTimeOnly: Displays only new incoming events in real-time; no historical data is available.
serverStore.serverNotConnected:
{serverName} ({serverUrl}) is not connected.
Please make sure it's online and set right API key in the configuration.
